info.title: LV_monday_com_Actions
info.description: Power Automate custom connector for friendly monday.com actions. Public actions use distinct paths and custom connector code rewrites each request to the monday.com GraphQL endpoint.

api_key.name: Authorization
api_key.description: Enter your monday.com API token when creating the connector connection. The token is supplied by Power Automate in the Authorization header and is not hard-coded or stored in this file.

post.description: Returns the item id, item name, board details, group details, and column values for a monday.com item.

200.description: Flattened monday.com item details response with direct dynamic content fields.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Returns one requested monday.com item column value with a friendly title, text value, raw column JSON, and raw response JSON.

200.description: Friendly monday.com item column value response.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Creates an update/comment on a monday.com item.

200.description: monday.com GraphQL response containing the created update id.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Changes a monday.com status column by friendly label. If Column ID is blank, the connector uses the default monday status column id: status.

200.description: monday.com GraphQL response containing the updated item id.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Changes any monday.com column value using a monday-compatible JSON string for the target column type.

200.description: monday.com GraphQL response containing the updated item id.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Creates a monday.com item, optionally in a specific group and with monday-compatible column values JSON.

200.description: monday.com GraphQL response containing the created item.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Returns monday.com workspaces as array-friendly id/name objects for dropdowns.

200.description: Returns monday.com workspaces as array-friendly id/name objects for dropdowns.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Returns monday.com boards for dropdowns, optionally filtered by workspace ID.

200.description: Returns monday.com boards for dropdowns, optionally filtered by workspace ID.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Returns groups for a selected monday.com board for dropdowns.

200.description: Returns groups for a selected monday.com board for dropdowns.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Returns columns for a selected monday.com board. This action is visible for troubleshooting dropdown configuration and column IDs.

200.description: Returns columns for a selected monday.com board. This action is visible for troubleshooting dropdown configuration and column IDs.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Returns items for a selected monday.com board for dropdowns. Uses items_page and includes cursor when monday.com returns one.

200.description: Returns items for a selected monday.com board for dropdowns. Uses items_page and includes cursor when monday.com returns one.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Returns configured labels for a selected status column by parsing the column settings_str returned by monday.com.

200.description: Returns configured labels for a selected status column by parsing the column settings_str returned by monday.com.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Friendly action that builds the monday.com date JSON value from Date and optional Time inputs, then calls change_column_value.

200.description: Friendly action that builds the monday.com date JSON value from Date and optional Time inputs, then calls change_column_value.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Friendly action that updates a monday.com text column without requiring makers to write JSON.

200.description: Friendly action that updates a monday.com text column without requiring makers to write JSON.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Friendly action that updates a monday.com number column without requiring makers to write JSON.

200.description: Friendly action that updates a monday.com number column without requiring makers to write JSON.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Creates a subitem under a monday.com parent item. Optional columnValues is a monday-compatible JSON string.

200.description: Creates a subitem under a monday.com parent item. Optional columnValues is a monday-compatible JSON string.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Returns subitems for a monday.com parent item, including parent, board, and column values when available.

200.description: Returns subitems for a monday.com parent item, including parent, board, and column values when available.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Returns details for a monday.com subitem. Subitems are monday.com items and use the item details query pattern.

200.description: Returns details for a monday.com subitem. Subitems are monday.com items and use the item details query pattern.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

post.description: Changes any monday.com subitem column value using a monday-compatible JSON string. Classic boards may require the hidden subitems board ID; multi-level boards use the main board ID.

200.description: Changes any monday.com subitem column value using a monday-compatible JSON string. Classic boards may require the hidden subitems board ID; multi-level boards use the main board ID.

400.description: Validation error returned by the connector script before forwarding to monday.com.

default.description: monday.com GraphQL or HTTP error response.

GetMondayItemDetailsRequest.description: Input for the Get monday item details action.

itemId.description: The monday item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

GetMondayItemColumnValueRequest.description: Input for the Get monday item column value action.

itemId.description: The monday item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

columnId.description: The monday column ID, not the display name. Use List monday board columns to find it.

GetMondayItemDetailsResponse.description: Flattened response for the Get monday item details action. It exposes stable item, board, group, parent item, and readable column value fields as direct dynamic content and keeps the raw dynamic board column values JSON for troubleshooting.

success.description: True when monday.com returned an item; false when monday.com returned errors, non-JSON content, or no accessible item.

message.description: Human-readable result message, such as Item found, the monday.com error text, or an item-not-found/access message.

itemId.description: The requested monday item ID, or the item ID returned by monday.com when an item is found.

itemName.description: The name of the monday.com item when an item is found.

boardId.description: The ID of the monday.com board that contains the item when monday.com returns board details.

boardName.description: The name of the monday.com board that contains the item when monday.com returns board details.

groupId.description: The ID of the group that contains the item when monday.com returns group details.

groupName.description: The name/title of the group that contains the item when monday.com returns group details.

parentItemId.description: The parent item ID when the item is a subitem; otherwise this field is blank or null.

parentItemName.description: The parent item name when the item is a subitem; otherwise this field is blank or null.

columnValues.description: Readable monday.com board column values for the item. Each entry includes the column ID, display title, column type, text value, and raw value JSON string so makers can use column values without Parse JSON.

columnValuesTextSummary.description: Plain-text summary of readable monday.com column titles and values, with one Column: Value pair per line. Use this directly in plain-text email bodies or Teams messages.

columnValuesHtmlTable.description: Simple HTML table of readable monday.com column titles and values. Values are HTML encoded so this can be used directly in a Send email action HTML body.

columnValuesJson.description: Compact JSON string containing the monday.com column_values array. This remains JSON because board columns and their value shapes are dynamic by board.

rawResponseJson.description: Compact JSON string containing the full monday.com response, or the raw non-JSON response text if monday.com did not return JSON.

MondayColumnValueSummary.description: Readable summary for one monday.com item column value.

columnTitle.description: The display title of the monday column when available.

columnType.description: The monday column type when available.

text.description: The readable text value returned by monday.com for this column.

valueJson.description: The compact raw JSON value returned by monday.com for this column, as a string.

GetMondayItemColumnValueResponse.description: Response for the Get monday item column value action. It returns one requested column with friendly dynamic content plus raw JSON for troubleshooting.

success.description: True when the item and requested column were found; false when monday.com returned errors, no accessible item, or the column was not found.

message.description: Human-readable result message, including helpful not-found details when the requested column is not available.

itemId.description: The requested monday item ID, or the item ID returned by monday.com when an item is found.

columnTitle.description: The display title of the requested monday column when available.

columnType.description: The monday column type when available.

columnText.description: The readable text value returned by monday.com for the requested column.

columnValueJson.description: The compact raw JSON value returned by monday.com for the requested column, as a string.

rawColumnJson.description: Compact JSON string containing the full monday.com column_values object for the requested column.

rawResponseJson.description: Compact JSON string containing the full monday.com response, or the raw non-JSON response text if monday.com did not return JSON.

CreateMondayItemUpdateRequest.description: Input for the Create monday item update/comment action.

itemId.description: The monday item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

updateText.description: Text to add as an update/comment on the monday item.

ChangeMondayStatusRequest.description: Input for the Change monday status column action.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

itemId.description: The monday item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

columnId.description: The monday column ID, not the display name. Use List monday board columns to find it.

label.description: The visible status label, such as Done or Working on it.

ChangeMondayColumnValueRequest.description: Input for the Change monday column value action.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

itemId.description: The monday item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

columnId.description: The monday column ID, not the display name. Use List monday board columns to find it.

value.description: Advanced monday-compatible JSON value. Use typed actions such as Change monday date, text, number, or status when possible.

CreateMondayItemRequest.description: Input for the Create monday item action.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

itemName.description: The name of the new monday.com item.

groupId.description: The monday group ID. Use List monday board groups to find it.

columnValues.description: Optional monday-compatible JSON string for initial column values, for example {"status":{"label":"Working on it"}}.

MondayGraphQlResponse.description: Raw monday.com GraphQL response. Successful GraphQL calls return data; GraphQL validation or execution problems may return errors.

errors.description: Raw monday.com GraphQL errors array, when monday.com returns GraphQL errors.

ConnectorValidationError.description: Validation error returned by connector custom code before the request is forwarded.

ListMondayWorkspacesRequest.description: Input for listing monday.com workspaces for dropdowns.

ListMondayBoardsRequest.description: Input for listing monday.com boards for dropdowns.

workspaceId.description: Optional workspace ID used to filter the returned boards.

ListMondayBoardGroupsRequest.description: Input for listing groups on a monday.com board.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

ListMondayBoardColumnsRequest.description: Input for listing columns on a monday.com board.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

columnType.description: Optional monday.com column type filter such as status, date, text, numbers, or subitems.

ListMondayBoardItemsRequest.description: Input for listing items on a monday.com board.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 100; maximum is 500.

ListMondayStatusLabelsRequest.description: Input for listing labels configured on a monday.com status column.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

columnId.description: The monday column ID, not the display name. Use List monday board columns to find it.

ChangeMondayDateColumnRequest.description: Input for the friendly typed date column update action.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

itemId.description: The monday item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

columnId.description: The monday column ID, not the display name. Use List monday board columns to find it.

time.description: Optional time value in HH:mm format.

ChangeMondayTextColumnRequest.description: Input for the friendly typed text column update action.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

itemId.description: The monday item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

columnId.description: The monday column ID, not the display name. Use List monday board columns to find it.

text.description: Text value to set in the selected text column.

ChangeMondayNumberColumnRequest.description: Input for the friendly typed number column update action.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

itemId.description: The monday item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

columnId.description: The monday column ID, not the display name. Use List monday board columns to find it.

number.description: Numeric value to set in the selected number column.

CreateMondaySubitemRequest.description: Input for creating a monday.com subitem.

parentItemId.description: The monday parent item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

itemName.description: The name of the new subitem.

columnValues.description: Optional monday-compatible JSON string for initial subitem column values.

GetMondaySubitemsRequest.description: Input for retrieving subitems for a monday.com item.

parentItemId.description: The monday parent item ID. This may appear as pulseId in webhook payloads.

GetMondaySubitemDetailsRequest.description: Input for retrieving details for a monday.com subitem.

subitemId.description: The monday subitem item ID. Subitems are monday items too.

ChangeMondaySubitemColumnValueRequest.description: Input for changing a subitem column value.

boardId.description: The monday board ID. Use List monday boards or copy it from the board URL.

subitemId.description: The monday subitem item ID. Subitems are monday items too.

columnId.description: The monday column ID, not the display name. Use List monday board columns to find it.

value.description: Advanced monday-compatible JSON value. Use typed actions such as Change monday date, text, number, or status when possible.

MondayDropdownListResponse.description: Array-friendly dropdown response returned by connector custom code for metadata actions.

value.description: Objects suitable for Power Platform dynamic dropdowns.
